title: exposes tcp port only if no proto specified.
body:
Also it fix the issue of exposing both tc/udp port even if only one proto specified.

Fixes #735 

Signed-off-by: Kunal Kushwaha <kushwaha_kunal_v7@lab.ntt.co.jp>

comments.body:
You need to fix the test.

```
  podman port  -l nginx [It]
  /go/src/github.com/containers/libpod/test/e2e/port_test.go:47

  Expected
      <bool>: false
  to be true

  /go/src/github.com/containers/libpod/test/e2e/port_test.go:57

  Full Stack Trace
  	/go/src/github.com/onsi/gomega/internal/assertion/assertion.go:69 +0x1ed
  github.com/onsi/gomega/internal/assertion.(*Assertion).To(0xc420fa57c0, 0x11eb100, 0x1ac9fb8, 0x0, 0x0, 0x0, 0xc420fa57c0)
  	/go/src/github.com/onsi/gomega/internal/assertion/assertion.go:35 +0xae
  github.com/containers/libpod/test/e2e.glob..func29.5()
  	/go/src/github.com/containers/libpod/test/e2e/port_test.go:57 +0x4b7
  github.com/onsi/ginkgo/internal/leafnodes.(*runner).runSync(0xc4200c4720, 0x0, 0x0, 0x0, 0x0, 0x0, 0x0, 0x0, 0x0, 0x0, ...)
  	/go/src/github.com/containers/libpod/test/e2e/libpod_suite_test.go:83 +0xaa
  testing.tRunner(0xc4204741e0, 0x11517d8)
  	/usr/lib/golang/src/testing/testing.go:777 +0xd0
  created by testing.(*T).Run
  	/usr/lib/golang/src/testing/testing.go:824 +0x2e0
  ```
Aside from the test fix @rhatdan identified, this LGTM. I like it when these things turn out to be simple.
